basic_details.job_title: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Sundargarh Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 47 Pediatrician, Medical Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Zilla Swasthya Samiti, Sundargarh (DPMU, NHM), Office of the CDM & PHO cum DMD, Sundargarh
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer-DTC, MO-MBBS at DEIC, Pediatrician at DEIC, MO-MBBS at UPHC-AAM, Medical Officer AYUSH (Collocated/RBSK/MHU), Optometrist-DEIC, Dental Technician-DEIC
basic_details.short_information: Zilla Swasthya Samiti, Sundargarh is recruiting 47 posts across Medical Officer (Allopathy & AYUSH), Pediatrician, Optometrist and Dental Technician on contractual basis, Walk-in Interview from 09-06-2026 to 12-06-2026.

important_dates.registration timing (all posts): 8:00 AM to 11:00 AM on respective Walk-in date

age_limit.details: The lower age limit for all posts is 21 years as on 01-05-2026. Upper age limits vary by post as given below. Age relaxation for existing OSH & FW Society employees is available at 1 year per completed contractual term (11 months each), subject to a maximum of 10 years over and above the prescribed upper age limit and subject to a ceiling of 55 years, provided the employee has completed at least 3 terms with "Outstanding" or "Very Good" PAR remarks.

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: MBBS from NMC-recognized institution OR MBBS with Diploma/MD in Public Health / Tuberculosis & Chest Diseases from NMC-recognized institution
MBBS from NMC-recognized institution + MD in Paediatrics OR Diploma of National Board in Child Health OR Diploma in Child Health from a recognized university/institution

Bachelor Degree in Ayurvedic Medicine & Surgery (BAMS) / Homeopathy Medicine & Surgery (BHMS) / Degree in Unani System of Medicine included in the 2nd Schedule of Indian Medicine Central Council Act 1970 from a recognized university; must have completed internship training. PG degree in BAMS/BHMS/Unani will be given additional weightage.

Diploma in Optometry from a recognized institution OR trained as Ophthalmic Assistant from a recognized Govt. Hospital/Institution. Candidates with Masters/Bachelor Degree in Optometry will be given preference.
Diploma in Dental Technology (at least 2-year course duration) from a recognized institution/university recognized by Dental Council of India

qualification.details: All candidates must have passed Odia up to M.E. standard. Candidates must hold valid registration from the respective Medical Council/Board as applicable to their post. No provisional registration is acceptable for AYUSH posts. Candidates previously disengaged from OSH & FW Society on administrative grounds (disobedience, poor performance, misbehaviour, criminal activity) are not eligible to apply.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Medical Officer AYUSH – Collocated Facilities (Ayurvedic, Homeopathy, Unani)
Medical Officer AYUSH – RBSK (Ayurvedic Male/Female, Homeopathy Male/Female)

selection_process: Medical Officer – DTC, MO-MBBS at DEIC, Pediatrician at DEIC, MO-MBBS UPHC-AAM Personal Interview (PI) – 100% Candidates securing more than 50% in PI will be entertained for panel

Medical Officer AYUSH (all facilities) Career Assessment (Merit-based) Matriculation – 20 marks; +2 – 20 marks; BHMS/BAMS/Unani degree – 50 marks; PG in Ayurvedic/Homeopathy/Unani – Full 10 marks. Tie-break: older candidate ranked above younger (as per 10th certificate DOB). Total marks up to 3 decimal digits (e.g. 45.567%). Candidates securing 50% and more in Final Panel Merit List will be kept in panel for 1 year.
Optometrist – DEIC Personal Interview (PI) – 100% Candidates securing more than 50% in PI will be entertained for panel
Dental Technician – DEIC Personal Interview (PI) – 100% Candidates securing more than 50% in PI will be entertained for panel
Selection is through Walk-in Interview only. There is no written examination. After registration (8:00 AM to 11:00 AM)

candidates will be shortlisted based on eligibility criteria and original documents will be verified on the same day. Shortlisted candidates may be asked to stay back for document verification. Candidates securing 50% or more marks in the Final Panel Merit List will be kept in the Panel with validity of 1 year from the date of approval
and this panel shall also be valid for similar posts in other NHM programmes with the same qualification and remuneration.
how_to_apply: There is no online application process. Candidates must appear directly for the Walk-in Interview at the scheduled venue on the respective date for their post. The prescribed application form must be downloaded from www.sundargarh.odisha.gov.in, filled in completely and brought to the Walk-in Interview along with all required documents. Registration will be from 8:00 AM to 11:00 AM on the day of the Walk-in Interview. No application will be received beyond 11:00 AM.
Documents to be Brought to the Walk-in Interview:
Duly filled application form in prescribed format (downloaded from www.sundargarh.odisha.gov.in)
All original certificates and testimonials in support of age, qualification and experience
A set of self-attested photocopies of all certificates/testimonials
Two recent passport size colour photographs (one self-attested for affixing on application form)
Self-attested photocopy of Identity Proof (Voter ID Card / PAN Card / Driving License / Aadhar Card / Passport)
Valid Registration Certificate from Odisha Council of Medical Registration (for MBBS posts) or Odisha State Council/Board of Ayurvedic/Homeopathy Medicine (for AYUSH posts)
Internship completion certificate (for AYUSH MO posts)
Conversion certificate (if marks are in CGPA/OGPA/GPA/CPI format) and AICTE/UGC recognition certificate wherever applicable
No Objection Certificate from employer (for candidates currently working in Health Department on regular or contractual basis)
Proof of PAR Rating such as PI Order or certification from employer (for OSH & FW Society employees claiming age relaxation/grace marks)
For further details visit: www.sundargarh.odisha.gov.in | Email: [email protected]
important_instructions: All positions are purely temporary and co-terminus with the scheme. Canvassing in any form will render the candidate disqualified. Registration timing is strictly 8:00 AM to 11:00 AM. No application will be received after 11:00 AM on the respective Walk-in date. After registration, candidates will be shortlisted based on eligibility and original documents will be verified on the same day. Shortlisted candidates may be asked to stay back. Candidates not fulfilling eligibility criteria need not come for the interview/registration. If any candidate fails to produce original documents during verification, candidature will be rejected and no conditionality will be entertained. All communication will be made through email or the district website only. No postal/personal correspondence will be made to candidates. Candidates must visit www.sundargarh.odisha.gov.in regularly for notifications, updates and results. Number of vacancies and remunerations may vary at the time of actual engagement. Performance Incentive and Performance Linked Experience Incentive will be paid as per norm for the same post. Candidates securing 50% or more in the Final Panel Merit List will be kept in the Panel with validity of 1 year; the panel is also valid for similar posts in other NHM programmes with the same qualification and remuneration. Suppression of material information or furnishing false documents will lead to rejection of candidature/termination from service and the same will apply even after engagement. The undersigned reserves the right to cancel any or all applications/positions at any stage of the recruitment process without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for Sundargarh NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be conducted from June 9 to June 12, 2026, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NHM Sundargarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 47 vacancies have been announced for various medical and paramedical posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no online application. Candidates must attend the walk-in interview with a filled application form.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for NHM Sundargarh posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from ₹16,837 to ₹90,422 per month, along with performance incentives up to 25%.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Sundargarh NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Minimum age: 21 years Maximum age varies by post: up to 67 years for MBBS posts, 38 years for AYUSH, and 40 years for paramedical posts

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NHM Sundargarh Recruitment?
faq.answer: Selection is based on: Walk-in interview (Personal Interview) for most posts Career assessment (merit-based evaluation) for AYUSH Medical Officer posts

faq.question: Q7. What qualifications are required for NHM Sundargarh jobs?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, including: MBBS / MD / Diploma for medical posts BAMS / BHMS / Unani degree for AYUSH posts Diploma in Optometry or Dental Technology for paramedical posts

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for NHM Sundargarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category.
